meaning: n.璇锋暀,鍜ㄨ,纾嬪晢,[鍖籡浼氳瘖
examples: David gives the first consultation gratis.
The decision was taken after close consultation with local residents.
A personal diet plan is devised after a consultation with a nutritionist.
The consultation paper should pave the way for formal guidance to all final-salary pension schemes.
The draft plan is due to be published for public consultation in the spring.
